latest_risks: Real Hermes, OpenClaw, and Coven runtimes were not launched in the latest packets; coverage uses mock and fixture-backed live-shaped artifact writers with replay.
The dedicated worktree did not include the broader autonomous docs/state files from the shared checkout, so this branch starts its own scoped state handoff.
